rejected_columns.datetime: Raw timestamp/date has high cardinality; derived time columns are safer.
rejected_columns.date: Raw timestamp/date has high cardinality; derived time columns are safer.
rejected_columns.aqi_category: Derived from AQI and would leak the target.

feature_reasons.year: Numeric feature retained because it may contain predictive signal.
feature_reasons.month: Time features capture seasonal, daily, and traffic-pattern effects.
feature_reasons.day: Time features capture seasonal, daily, and traffic-pattern effects.
feature_reasons.hour: Time features capture seasonal, daily, and traffic-pattern effects.
feature_reasons.day_of_week: Categorical context captures location and calendar patterns.
feature_reasons.is_weekend: Time features capture seasonal, daily, and traffic-pattern effects.
feature_reasons.season: Categorical context captures location and calendar patterns.
feature_reasons.city: Categorical context captures location and calendar patterns.
feature_reasons.station: Categorical context captures location and calendar patterns.
feature_reasons.latitude: Coordinates capture spatial variation between monitoring areas.
feature_reasons.longitude: Coordinates capture spatial variation between monitoring areas.
feature_reasons.pm25: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.pm10: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.no2: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.so2: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.co: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.o3: Pollutant concentration directly drives AQI levels.
feature_reasons.temperature: Temperature influences pollutant formation and dispersion.
feature_reasons.humidity: Humidity changes particulate behavior and visibility.
feature_reasons.visibility: Visibility is strongly inversely related to particulate pollution.

selected_model_reason: Selected because it achieved the lowest RMSE on the held-out 20% test split; R2 is used as the tie-breaker.
